concepts.name: home
concepts.definition_snippet: Space used as permanent or semi-permanent residence

concepts.name: shelter
concepts.definition_snippet: Homes provide sheltered spaces for domestic activity

concepts.name: privacy
concepts.definition_snippet: Privacy, intimacy and familiarity gained prominence post-Enlightenment

concepts.name: homelessness
concepts.definition_snippet: State of being without a home

concepts.name: identity
concepts.definition_snippet: Home serves as symbol of self, bound to life events

concepts.name: tenure
concepts.definition_snippet: Financial arrangement for right to live in house

concepts.name: family
concepts.definition_snippet: Connection between home and family, some consider synonymous

concepts.name: community
concepts.definition_snippet: Perception of home extends beyond residence to neighborhood and nation
